originalTitle: 'It was either killed or be killed' - ongoing nightmares of an ex-child soldier in Somalia
title: A Brave Man's Story: Finding Hope After Hard Times
content:
Hello Friends from Africa!

Hello, amazing friends, all across our wonderful continent of Africa! I'm your kid-friendly reporter, and today we're going to talk about a very special person. We’re going to learn about a brave man named Yusuf and why it's so important for all children to be safe and happy. It's a story that reminds us why peace is a beautiful thing. Yusuf's story starts in a place called Somalia, which is a country in eastern Africa. It has a very long coastline with beautiful beaches. Yusuf lives in a big city there called Mogadishu. He is now 34 years old, which is much older than you!

Meet Yusuf: A Brave Man

Yusuf is a grown-up man now. He lives in Mogadishu, a bustling city where people are busy doing many things. He is safe now, and that's a very good thing. But Yusuf has some special memories. Memories are like little pictures or feelings we keep in our minds from things that happened in the past. Sometimes, Yusuf's memories are sad. They are like "dark reminders" of a time when he was a little boy. These memories can make him feel a bit sad or worried even today. It's okay to have sad memories, and it's brave to talk about them. Did you know? Everyone has memories! Some are happy, like your last birthday party, and some might be a little bit sad, like when a toy breaks. All memories help us learn and grow.

What is a "Child Soldier"?

Now, let's talk about something called a "child soldier." This is a very grown-up name for a very sad thing that can happen. A soldier is usually an adult who joins an army to protect their country. But sometimes, in places where there is fighting, bad people might force children to become soldiers. Imagine if someone told you that you couldn't go to school or play. Instead, they made you do scary things that grown-ups should do. That's what being a child soldier means. It means a child, like you, is made to carry a weapon or do dangerous things when they should be learning and playing. This is not fair, because children should always be safe. Children should be in school, learning their ABCs and numbers. They should be playing games with their friends, running around, and laughing. They should be with their families, feeling loved and protected. Did you know? There are special rules in the world that say children must be protected. No child should ever be made to fight or be a soldier.

The Sad Memories

When Yusuf was a little boy, he was made to be a child soldier. This means he had to live through very hard and scary times. He remembers feeling like he had to make very difficult choices, like "it was either killed or be killed." This means he felt he had to fight to stay alive. These memories are the dark reminders Yusuf carries. They are not happy memories, but they are a part of his story. It was not Yusuf's choice to be a child soldier. Children are often tricked, scared, or forced into these situations. It's never the child's fault. Even though Yusuf is safe now and grown-up, these sad memories can still pop into his head. Sometimes, they can make him feel scared or alone. It's like having a bad dream even when you are awake. This is why it's so important that we talk about people like Yusuf with kindness and understanding. Did you know? When someone has been through hard times, they might need extra help and love. Being kind to everyone is always a good idea!

How People Are Helping Yusuf

Yusuf is not alone. Many good people want to help him and others who were child soldiers. There are special doctors and helpers called counselors. These helpers talk to Yusuf. They listen to his memories and help him understand his feelings. They teach him ways to feel better and not be so scared by his past. They also help Yusuf learn new skills. Maybe they help him learn to read better, or learn a job, like building things or fixing cars. This helps Yusuf feel strong and useful, and it helps him build a happy new life for himself in Mogadishu. His family, friends, and neighbors in his community also help. A community is like a big family where everyone lives close and takes care of each other. When everyone works together, it helps people like Yusuf feel safe and happy again. Did you know? Many amazing people and groups around the world work hard to help children and grown-ups who have been through tough times. They believe in second chances and brighter futures!

Why Peace is So Important

Yusuf's story shows us how important peace is. Peace means no fighting, no wars, and everyone living together safely and happily. When there is peace, children can go to school every day. They can learn, play, and dream of their futures. When there is peace, families can stay together and feel safe in their homes. People can work, build, and grow their communities. They can share their culture, stories, and laughter without fear. Peace allows countries like Somalia, and all of Africa, to grow strong and beautiful. Imagine a world where every child can wake up feeling safe, go to school, play with friends, and sleep soundly at night. That's what peace gives us! It's the most wonderful gift we can have. Did you know? Somalia is also famous for its rich history, beautiful poetry, and delicious food like 'Bariis Iskukaris' (a rice dish). Peace helps everyone enjoy these wonderful things!

What You Can Do!

Even though you are small, you can help make the world a more peaceful place! How? By being kind to everyone you meet. Share your toys with your friends. Listen to your teachers and parents. Always try to solve problems with words, not with anger or fighting. Be a good friend. If you see someone sad, ask if they are okay. A simple smile or a kind word can make a big difference. Every little act of kindness and understanding helps build a stronger, more peaceful world for everyone. Did you know? Your smile can make someone else's day brighter! It's true!

Let's Dream of a Peaceful Africa!

Yusuf is a brave man, and he is working hard to heal his sad memories. His story reminds us to cherish peace and to always protect children. We want every child in Africa to grow up safe, happy, and free to learn and play. Let's all dream of an Africa where every child is safe, every family is happy, and peace shines brightly from every village to every big city. Thank you for listening to Yusuf's story. Remember to always choose kindness and peace!
summary: Yusuf Ali, a brave man from Somalia, now 34, is finding hope and healing in Mogadishu after a childhood spent as a child soldier, reminding us why peace and protecting children are so important across Africa.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows us that all children need to be safe, go to school, and play, not fight. It also shows us how brave people like Yusuf are, and how important it is for everyone to help each other heal and build a peaceful world.

originalTitle: The cash-in-the-sofa saga that just won't go away for South Africa's president
title: A Money Mystery at Our President's Farm!
content:
Hello, Little Friends!

Hi everyone! It's me, your friendly news reporter for Africa. Today, we're going to talk about a little story about our President in South Africa. It's like a puzzle, and we'll try to understand it together, nice and easy. South Africa is a beautiful country. Our President is a very important person. He is like the head teacher of our whole country. He helps make sure everyone is safe and happy. His name is President Cyril Ramaphosa. He is the leader for all the people in South Africa. He works very hard to make our country a good place for all of us.

Who is Our President?

President Cyril Ramaphosa is a kind man. He cares a lot about South Africa. He has a big job to do every single day. He helps make important rules. These rules help everyone live together peacefully. Just like your school has rules, our country has rules too. Did you know? South Africa is famous for its beautiful wildlife, like lions, elephants, and giraffes! It's also known as the 'Rainbow Nation' because so many different kinds of people live there happily.

A Big Farm and Hidden Money

Now, let's talk about a small mystery. Our President has a big farm. Farms are places where animals live and food grows. His farm has special animals like game, which are wild animals that live on a big piece of land. One day, a very long time ago, something unexpected happened at his farm. Some money was found hidden in furniture. Like in a couch or under a mattress! It was a lot of money. People use money to buy things like food, clothes, and toys. But finding a lot of money hidden like that is a bit strange, right?

What Happened at the Farm?

Around four years ago, some bad people broke into the President's farm. They stole the money that was hidden. This is called a break-in. Breaking into someone's home and stealing is very wrong. The bad people were caught later. But this break-in made people ask questions about the hidden money. People wondered why so much money was hidden at the farm. They also wondered if everything was done correctly, according to the country's rules. Did you know? A 'farm' in South Africa can be very, very big, sometimes as big as many soccer fields put together! They grow many things like maize and sunflowers.

Why is it a Big Story?

This story became a big deal. Why? Because our President is a very important leader. Leaders must follow all the rules very carefully. They must be very clear about everything they do. It's like when your teacher tells you to always be honest. Our President also has to be honest and follow all the country's rules, especially with money. Some people felt that maybe the President did not follow all the rules about money. This made them worried and want to know more.

Special Helpers are Looking!

Because people had questions, some special helpers were asked to look into the matter. These helpers are called Members of Parliament, or MPs for short. MPs are like the school prefects and teachers who help the head teacher run the school. They work in a big building called Parliament. They are chosen by the people to represent them. They formed a small group, like a special team, to study this money mystery. This special team is called a 'committee'. Their job is to find out all the facts. Did you know? Parliament is a very important place where people talk about laws and rules for the country. It's usually a big, old building!

What are the Special Helpers Doing?

The special helpers, the committee, looked at everything very carefully. They read many papers and listened to many people. They are like detectives trying to solve a puzzle. They wrote a report about what they found. A report is like a very long story that explains all the facts. This report has made many people talk even more. The report said that maybe the President has some questions to answer. It said that maybe he did not follow all the rules. But it's not the final answer yet.

Will Our President Stay?

Now, the MPs will have to make a big decision. They will have a 'vote'. A vote is when everyone says 'yes' or 'no' to something. It's like putting up your hand in class to choose something. They will vote on whether they think the President should stay as the President or not. This is a very important vote for our country. If enough MPs say 'yes' to him staying, then he will continue to be our President. This is what 'survive a vote' means – he gets enough support to keep his job. Did you know? Voting is how people choose their leaders. Every grown-up gets to vote to pick who they think will be the best leader for the country!

Why Do Rules Matter?

This whole story shows us something very important: rules matter! Especially when you are a leader. Everyone, even the President, must follow the rules. Following rules helps everyone trust each other. It makes sure that everything is fair and right. It keeps our country strong and happy. We all want our leaders to be honest and good. We want them to set a good example for everyone, especially for young people like you.

Let's Learn Together!

So, this is the money mystery story for now. The special helpers (MPs) are still working. Soon, they will vote. We will watch and learn what happens next. It's a big story, but it teaches us about how our country works. It teaches us about rules and leaders. And it teaches us that everyone is important. Thank you for listening, little friends! Keep being curious and keep learning new things every day. See you next time!
summary: There's a story about South Africa's President, Cyril Ramaphosa, where money was found hidden at his farm, leading special helpers (MPs) to investigate if all rules were followed.
whyMatters: This story is important because even very big leaders like our President must follow all the rules, especially about money, to show everyone fairness and honesty for our country.

originalTitle: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
title: A Sad Story from the Big Desert
content:
Hello, My Friends!

Hello, everyone! It's your friend here, reporting from sunny Africa. Today, I have some sad news to share. It's about how important water is, especially in very hot places. We heard about something sad that happened in the Sahara Desert. The Sahara Desert is a giant, sandy place in Africa. It is one of the biggest deserts in the whole wide world! We learned that nearly 50 people got lost there. They were traveling in a big truck, which we sometimes call a lorry. But the lorry stopped working. It broke down! This meant they were stuck in the middle of the desert. And sadly, almost all of them died because they did not have any water to drink. This is called dying of thirst.

What Happened in the Desert?

Imagine you are playing outside on a very hot day. You run and play. Soon, you feel very thirsty, don't you? You need a drink of water. Well, these people were in a place that is hot like that all the time, but much, much hotter. And there was no water nearby. Their big truck was carrying them across the desert. It was like a big bus, but for rough roads. But then, *poof*! The engine stopped. The truck could not move anymore. They were stuck. They were very, very far from any towns or villages. There was sand everywhere, and the sun was shining down very, very hot.

The Big Sahara Desert

The Sahara Desert is huge! It is bigger than many countries put together. It has lots and lots of sand dunes. These are like mountains made of sand. Sometimes, there are rocks too. But mostly, it's just sand, sand, and more sand. And it's super hot during the day. Did you know? The Sahara Desert is so big, it covers parts of many different countries in Africa! It can get as hot as 50 degrees Celsius (that's like 122 degrees Fahrenheit) during the day. That's why water is so important there. People, animals, and plants need water to live. Without water, nothing can grow, and nothing can live for long.

Why Water is So Important

When you don't drink water, your body starts to get weak. You feel very, very thirsty. Your mouth gets dry. Your head might start to hurt. This is what we call dehydration. If you don't drink water for a long, long time, your body cannot work anymore. This is why these people got very sick and sadly passed away. Water helps our bodies do many important things. It helps us play and learn. It helps our food go down. It keeps us cool. Imagine a plant that doesn't get water. It wilts and dies. Our bodies are a bit like that plant. We need water every single day to stay healthy and strong. Always remember to drink your water! Did you know? Humans can only live for about 3 days without water. But we can live for much longer without food! This shows how special and important water is for our lives. Always carry water when you go on a trip, especially to a hot place.

The Brave Survivors

Out of all those people, only two were strong enough to try and get help. Imagine how brave they were! They decided they had to walk. They started walking across the huge desert to find someone. They walked for a very, very long time. It was a very hard journey. They walked over 50 kilometers. That's like walking from one town to another far-off town! Or like walking around a big football field many, many times. Can you imagine walking that far in the hot sun, with no water? Their feet must have been so sore, and they must have been so, so tired. But they kept going. They walked for many, many hours, maybe even days. They were trying to find people who could help. These people are called the authorities. The authorities are like the police or rescue workers who can help people in trouble. These two brave people kept walking and walking, even when it felt like they couldn't go anymore.

Help Arrives (But It Was Too Late for Many)

After a very, very long and hard walk, the two brave people finally found help. They told the authorities about their friends and family stuck in the desert. The authorities quickly got ready to go and help. They knew it was an emergency. But because the desert is so big, and because the truck had broken down so far away, it took a long time to get there. When the rescue teams finally arrived at the place where the truck was, it was very, very sad. Almost everyone had already died because of thirst. This made everyone very sad. This sad story teaches us a big lesson. It teaches us how dangerous the desert can be if you are not prepared. And it teaches us how important it is to always have water.

What We Learn from This Sad Story

We learn many things from this very sad event. 1. **Water is Life:** Always remember to drink water, especially when it's hot. 2. **Be Prepared:** If you travel to a faraway place, always make sure you have enough water and food. 3. **Travel Safely:** Make sure your car or truck is working well before a long journey. 4. **Deserts Are Dangerous:** The desert is a beautiful place, but it can be very dangerous if you don't know how to be safe there. It's not a place to play without grown-ups. Did you know? Camels are very special desert animals. They can go for many days without drinking water! Their bodies are made to store water and survive in the desert. Humans are not like camels, so we need to carry our water with us.

My Important Message

So, my friends, this sad story reminds us all to be careful. Always listen to your grown-ups. If you go on a trip, especially a long one, ask if there is enough water. And always drink your water every day to stay healthy. Remember, water is one of the most precious things we have. It helps all of us live and grow. Let's always appreciate water and use it wisely. Be safe, my friends, and keep drinking your water!
summary: Nearly 50 people sadly died of thirst in the very hot Sahara Desert after their truck broke down, showing how important water and being prepared are.
whyMatters: This story is important because it teaches us that water is super important for life, especially in hot places like the desert, and we must always be safe and prepared when traveling.

originalTitle: Messi sits out Argentina’s pre-World Cup friendly due to hamstring strain
title: Messi sits out Argentina’s pre-World Cup friendly due to hamstring strain
content: Messi's progress depends on his 'clinical and functional progress', Argentina officials say ahead of title defence.

originalTitle: Iran war day 100: US, Iran trade attacks again, raising tensions
title: Big News from Far Away: Boats, Drones, and Feeling Worried!
content:
Jambo, my amazing young friends across Africa! It's your friendly reporter, Zola, bringing you important news from far, far away. Today, we are talking about something that happened between two big countries called America and Iran.

What Happened Far Away?

Something big happened in a busy sea path. Imagine a very important road, but for ships! This sea road is called the Strait of Hormuz. It's very, very important for boats from all over the world. America is a big country. Iran is another big country. Sometimes, grown-ups in these countries feel a bit cross or worried about each other. We call this 'tensions.' It's like when you and your friend have a disagreement. This time, America said that flying robots, called drones, from Iran were flying where they shouldn't. So, America used its own strong machines to shoot down these drones. Shooting down means making them fall out of the sky. This made the 'tensions' – those worried feelings – even bigger between America and Iran.

What Are Drones?

Have you ever seen a toy helicopter that flies without a driver inside? Well, drones are like much bigger, smarter versions of those! They are flying machines, but no person sits inside to fly them. Someone on the ground controls them with a special remote control, just like you might control a toy car. *Did you know?* Some drones are used to deliver packages, some help farmers check their fields, and some even take amazing pictures from the sky! But some drones are used by armies. These drones can fly high and see things from above. The drones America shot down were from Iran's army.

Where is the Strait of Hormuz?

Let's talk about this special sea road. Imagine looking at a map of the world. It's a narrow path of water between two big pieces of land. Lots and lots of ships need to pass through this narrow path. It's like a very busy roundabout or a highway for boats! These boats carry many important things. *Did you know?* The Strait of Hormuz is one of the busiest water roads in the world! Millions of barrels of oil pass through it every single day.

Why is this Sea Road Important?

Many, many big ships travel through the Strait of Hormuz every day. What do these ships carry? They carry important things like oil. Oil is like the special drink for cars, trucks, and even planes to make them go! It's also used to make electricity for our homes and to create many plastic things we use every day. So, if this sea road becomes unsafe or blocked, it means it's harder for ships to carry oil and other goods. This can make everything more expensive for everyone, even for us here in Africa! Imagine if the road to the market was blocked. It would be hard to get fresh food, right? It's a bit like that for the whole world when this sea road has problems.

Why Does This Make People Worried?

When big countries have 'tensions' and things like drones are shot down, it makes everyone feel a bit worried. It's like when friends stop talking and start arguing. Nobody likes that feeling. People worry that these small arguments could become bigger problems. We always hope that countries can talk to each other and solve their disagreements peacefully, like good friends should. It's important for everyone to get along, so that our world can be a happy and safe place for all children, including you!

What Does This Mean For Us in Africa?

Even though this happened far away from Africa, it can still affect us. Remember those ships carrying oil and other goods? Many of those things travel all over the world, to and from Africa. If the Strait of Hormuz is not safe, it could mean that things like petrol for our cars become more expensive. Or it could mean that toys and clothes from other countries cost more. So, even though we live far away, we hope for peace everywhere. We want all countries to be friends and work together. We hope that America and Iran can talk and stop feeling cross. Peace is the best way forward for everyone! Thanks for listening, my wonderful little listeners! Always remember to be kind and helpful to your friends. Until next time, stay curious and stay safe! Kwaheri!
summary: America shot down Iranian flying robots called drones over a very important sea road, making both countries feel more worried and increasing 'tensions' between them.
whyMatters: This is important because that sea road helps big ships carry oil and other goods for the whole world, and if there are problems there, things can become more expensive for everyone, everywhere.

originalTitle: Teenager Antonelli snatches Monaco pole with ‘magic lap’ for Mercedes
title: Antonelli's Amazing Monaco Race Start!
content:
Antonelli's Big News!

Hello, super speedsters! We have some exciting news from the world of fast cars! A young driver named Antonelli just did something amazing. He is a teenager, and he drives a super cool Mercedes race car. This week, he was racing in a very special place called Monaco. And guess what? Antonelli got the *very best* spot for the start of the race! This is called "pole position." It means he will start at the front of *all* the other cars. How cool is that?

What is Pole Position?

Imagine you are lining up for a running race with all your friends. "Pole position" is like getting to stand right at the very front of the starting line! No one is in front of you. This is super important in car racing. Why is it so good? Because it means Antonelli has the clearest path ahead. He doesn't have to worry about other cars blocking his way right at the start. It gives him a big advantage to zoom ahead and try to win the race! Did you know? Getting pole position means you were the fastest driver in a special practice race called "qualifying." It's like a test to see who is the very best at driving quickly!

Meet Antonelli, the Young Star

Antonelli is not just any driver; he is a real racing star! He is still a teenager, which makes his achievement even more incredible. Can you imagine doing something so big and important when you are still so young? He is showing everyone that young people can do amazing things! He drives for a very famous team called Mercedes. Their cars are known for being super fast and strong. Antonelli works very hard with his team to make sure his car is perfect for racing. He trains a lot to be the best driver he can be.

Monaco: A Super Special Race Track

The race happened in a place called Monaco. Monaco is a tiny, beautiful country next to the big blue sea. It's famous for its amazing buildings and super yachts, which are like very big boats! But it's also famous for its very special race track. The track in Monaco is not like other tracks. It's actually made of the city's streets! Imagine driving super fast cars through streets where people usually drive their normal cars. It has lots of tight corners and is very narrow. This makes it one of the trickiest races in the world. Did you know? Monaco is one of the smallest countries in the world! It's even smaller than some cities. But it hosts one of the biggest and most exciting races every year!

Antonelli's "Magic Lap"

The news said Antonelli had a "magic lap." What does that mean? It means he drove his car perfectly! He went super fast, didn't make any mistakes, and found the very best way around all those tricky corners in Monaco. He was smooth and quick, like a superhero flying! It's like scoring a perfect goal in football or hitting all the right notes in a song. Every turn, every straight part of the track, Antonelli drove with amazing skill. His car zoomed around the track faster than anyone else that day! It takes a lot of practice and bravery to drive like that. The drivers must be very focused. One tiny mistake on the narrow Monaco track can mean crashing into a wall! But Antonelli was brilliant, showing great concentration and talent.

His Super Fast Mercedes Car

Antonelli drives a fantastic car made by Mercedes. These cars are not like the ones your parents drive! They are called Formula 1 cars, or F1 cars for short. They are designed to go incredibly fast and are packed with special technology. F1 cars have special engines that make a very loud roar! They have special tires that stick to the road, helping them go fast around corners without slipping. They also look very sleek and cool, like something from a movie. Mercedes is one of the top teams in F1, and Antonelli is helping them win! Did you know? An F1 car can go from standing still to 100 kilometers per hour (that's super fast!) in less than 2 seconds! That's quicker than almost any other car you can think of. They are truly speed machines!

Antonelli is a Championship Leader!

This news also told us something very important about Antonelli: he is the F1 championship leader! What does that mean? It means that out of all the races that have happened so far this year, Antonelli has earned the most points. He is number one right now! In F1, drivers get points for finishing races in good positions, like first, second, or third. The driver with the most points at the end of the year wins the big "Championship" trophy! So, Antonelli is doing really, really well this season and has a great chance to win the whole thing!

An Italian Star Once More!

Antonelli is also making history because he is Italian. The news said he is the first Italian driver since Jarno Trulli in 2004 to get pole position in Monaco. That was a very, very long time ago! It was even before many of you were born! So, Antonelli is making his country very proud. It's a big moment for Italian racing fans to see one of their own drivers start at the front in such a famous and difficult race. Everyone in Italy must be cheering for him!

Why This is Such a Big Deal

Getting pole position in Monaco is extra special. Because the track is so narrow, it's very, very hard to overtake other cars. "Overtake" means going past another car. So, if you start at the front, it's much easier to stay in front and win! This makes Antonelli's achievement even more impressive. He showed everyone just how talented and fast he is. He is ready to race and try to win in one of the most exciting races of the year! It's a fantastic start for him.

Cheer for Antonelli!

So, let's give a big cheer for Antonelli! He is a young, super-fast driver who is making history. We wish him the very best for the race from pole position. Maybe he will zoom all the way to the finish line first and wave to all his fans! Go, Antonelli, go!
summary: A super fast young driver named Antonelli just got the best starting spot for a big race in Monaco, making him the first Italian to do so in a very long time!
whyMatters: This is important because Antonelli is very young and is leading the whole F1 championship, showing he is a super talented driver who could win the big prize for his country and team.

originalTitle: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
title: Remembering Brave Heroes: A Special Day in History!
content:
Hello, my wonderful friends in Africa! It's your friendly news reporter here, bringing you a special story from a faraway land. This story is all about brave people, remembering history, and why it's so important to be kind and help each other across the world. We're going to learn about a very important day that happened a long, long time ago, and why people still talk about it today!

A Special Place Called Normandy

Imagine a beautiful beach, with waves splashing and sand between your toes. This beach is in a country called France, very far from Africa. It's a place called Normandy. But many, many years ago, this beach was not a place for playing. It was a place where something very big and important happened, something that changed the world. More than 80 years ago, brave soldiers from many different countries came together on this beach. They came to help people who were in trouble. They wanted to make sure everyone could be free and safe. It was a very hard day, but they were super brave.

What Happened on That Day?

This special day is called D-Day. It was when lots and lots of soldiers, sailors, and pilots worked together as a team. They crossed a big ocean and landed on the beaches of Normandy. Their mission was to help free a part of Europe from some very unkind people who were making everyone sad and scared. It was like a big, important rescue mission! Think about when you and your friends work together to help someone. Maybe you help a friend who falls, or you share your toys to make someone happy. These soldiers did something much, much bigger, but it was still about helping others. They showed incredible courage and teamwork. They knew it was important to stand up for what was right and to protect people who couldn't protect themselves. Did you know? On D-Day, soldiers came from many countries, like America, Canada, and the United Kingdom! They were all working together as friends to help others.

An Important Person Speaks

Recently, a very important person from a country called America visited this special beach in Normandy. His name is an important title, like 'defence secretary', which means he helps make sure his country and its people are safe. He came to remember all the brave soldiers who helped on D-Day. He stood on that historic beach, where the waves crash, and he talked about remembering these heroes. He reminded everyone how important it is for countries to be friends and to work together. He talked about how important it is to protect freedom and peace, so that everyone can live happily without fear. He wanted to make sure that we never forget the lessons from that day. He also wanted to remind everyone that even today, we need to try our best to be kind and help each other, just like those soldiers did many years ago. This helps make the world a safer and happier place for everyone. Did you know? Important leaders often visit places where big historical events happened, to remember and to talk about important lessons for today!

Why Do We Remember D-Day?

Why do people still talk about something that happened so long ago, even before your parents or even your grandparents were born? Well, remembering is super important! When we remember D-Day, we are saying 'thank you' to all the brave people who risked so much to make the world a better place. We learn about courage, about working together, and about the importance of peace. We remember that bad things can happen when people are not kind, and that it's important to always choose kindness and friendship. Remembering also helps us learn from the past. It teaches us that freedom is precious and that we should always try to help others and stand up for what is right. Just like we remember special birthdays or happy holidays, remembering big historical events helps us understand where we come from and how to make a better future. Did you know? There are monuments and special places all over the world to remember brave soldiers and important historical moments. It helps us keep their stories alive!

Being Friends Across the World

This visit to Normandy reminds us that even though countries might be far apart, like Africa and France or America, we are all connected. We are all part of one big global family. It’s important for countries to be good friends, just like you are good friends with your classmates. When countries are friends, they can help each other. They can share ideas, trade things, and work together to solve big problems, like making sure everyone has enough food or goes to school. When we work together, we can build a much stronger and happier world for all children, everywhere. Did you know? There are special organisations where many countries come together to talk and work on making the world a more peaceful and fair place for everyone!

What Can We Learn?

So, what can we, as children in Africa, learn from this story from a faraway beach in France? We can learn that: * **Being brave is important:** Even small acts of bravery can make a big difference. * **Teamwork makes the dream work:** Working together with friends makes everything better. * **Kindness is key:** Always try to be kind and help others, especially those who need it. * **Remembering history helps us:** We learn important lessons from the past to build a better future. Let’s all try to be brave, kind, and good friends, not just in our villages and towns, but with people all around the world. Because when we work together, we can make every day a peaceful and happy day for everyone! Thank you for listening, and until next time, keep shining, my friends!

originalTitle: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
title: Big Meeting in Russia: Flying Robots Cause a Stir!
content:
Hello, Friends from Africa!

Hi everyone! It's your friendly news reporter for Africa here. Today, we're going to talk about something happening far, far away, in a big country called Russia. It might sound a bit grown-up, but we'll make it super simple, like a story. Understanding the world helps us grow big and smart! Let's find out what's happening.

What is an "Economic Forum"?

Imagine your school having a big meeting. Not just for teachers, but for people who decide how to get new books, build new classrooms, or even get more yummy lunch options! That's kind of like an "economic forum" for a country. "Economic" means all about money, jobs, and how people buy and sell things. It's about making life better for everyone in a country. A "forum" is a big meeting where important people come together to talk. So, Russia had a very important meeting in a beautiful city called St. Petersburg. People from different places were going there to talk about how to make their countries richer. They wanted to help everyone have good jobs and enough food. They hoped to share ideas and make plans for the future. It's like a big brainstorming session for making money work for everyone!

Where is St. Petersburg?

St. Petersburg is a very famous and beautiful city in Russia. Russia is the biggest country in the whole world! It's super far away from Africa, across many seas and lands. St. Petersburg has amazing buildings, like palaces, and lovely rivers flowing through it. It's a place where many important events happen, like this big meeting about money. **Did you know?** Russia is so big that it crosses two continents: Europe and Asia! It takes many hours to fly from one side to the other, just like a very long journey.

Who is President Putin?

Every country has a leader. In Russia, the leader is called President Putin. He is like the head of the whole country, making big decisions for his people. This economic forum was a very important event for him and his country. He wanted to show the world all the good things happening in Russia. He also hoped to make new friends for business. He thought this meeting would bring good things and good ideas to Russia.

What are Drones?

Now, let's talk about something called "drones." Have you ever seen a small flying toy with propellers? That's a bit like a drone! Drones are like little robots that can fly in the sky. They don't have a person inside them to fly, a person controls them from far away. Most of the time, drones are used for helpful things. People use them to take cool pictures from high up, like a bird's eye view of a beautiful landscape. Farmers use them to check on their fields to make sure crops are growing well. Some companies even want to use drones to deliver small packages right to your doorstep! They are clever machines that can fly without a pilot inside. They can do many amazing jobs. **Did you know?** Some drones are so tiny they can fit in your hand, while others are as big as a small aeroplane! They come in all different sizes.

What Happened in St. Petersburg?

Well, while these important people were getting ready for their big meeting about money and jobs in St. Petersburg, something else happened. Some drones, the flying robots we just talked about, were used in a way that wasn't helpful. These drones flew towards St. Petersburg, and it made people worry. It was a surprise for everyone there. It caused some noise and made people feel a bit unsafe. These drones were sent from a country called Ukraine. Ukraine is another country, next door to Russia. Sometimes, countries have disagreements, just like friends sometimes disagree. And when disagreements get very big, like between Russia and Ukraine, sometimes sad things like this happen. It's like if you were planning a big party, and suddenly a storm started. The storm wasn't part of the party plans, but it made everyone think about it and feel a bit uneasy.

"Overshadowed" – What Does That Mean?

The news said the economic forum was "overshadowed" by the drone attacks. What does that mean? Imagine you're watching a beautiful play on a stage, full of bright lights and amazing actors. Then, suddenly, the stage lights dim, and a big, dark cloud moves in front of the moon outside the window. The play is still happening, but everyone is now looking at the dark cloud or talking about the storm. The storm took all the attention away from the play. That's what "overshadowed" means here. The big meeting about money and good plans was still happening, but the drone attacks were so important and made people so worried. Everyone started talking about the drones instead of just the business plans. It took away some of the happy and positive feelings about the meeting. It made people think about safety and peace instead of just money and jobs. It was a serious moment that caught everyone's attention.

Why Does This Matter to Us?

You might think, "Russia is so far away, why should I know this?" That's a great question! Even though it's far, far away, understanding what happens in the world helps us learn about peace and how countries get along. We learn that sometimes, countries have big problems. We hope that leaders everywhere can talk and find peaceful ways to solve their problems, just like we try to solve problems with our friends and family. When countries have good trade and work together, it helps make the world a better place for everyone, including us here in Africa. It can mean more jobs, more food, and a better life for many people. We always wish for peace and safety for everyone in the world. Learning about these things helps us understand how big and connected our world is. So, while the meeting in Russia was about making money and good plans, the drones reminded everyone that peace is the most important thing for all people, everywhere. We hope for a world where drones are only used for good things, like taking pretty pictures or helping farmers, and never for causing worries. Let's keep learning and hoping for a peaceful world!
summary: Important people in Russia had a big meeting about money, but flying robots called drones caused worry and made people pay attention to something else.
whyMatters: It matters because it helps us understand that peace is important everywhere, and even far away news helps us learn about the world.

originalTitle: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas
title: A Big Game Story: Helpers Can't Fly?
content:
Hello, My Little Champions!

Hello, my little champions and future football stars! It's your friendly news reporter here, bringing you exciting stories from around our big, wonderful world. Today, we have a little story about a very big football game! Do you love watching football? Kicking a ball with your friends? It's so much fun, isn't it? Well, there's a game even bigger than your school match, called the World Cup!

What is the World Cup?

Imagine the best football teams from many, many countries all coming together to play. That's the World Cup! It's like a giant party where teams try their very best to win a special trophy. It happens only every four years, so it's a super special event. Boys and girls from all over Africa and the world watch this amazing game. Everyone gets very excited! Did you know? The World Cup is the most watched sports event in the whole wide world! More people watch it than almost anything else!

Teams from Far Away Lands

In our story today, we are talking about two countries far, far away from us. One country is called Iran. They have a very good football team. The other country is called the United States, or USA for short. They also have a strong football team. These two teams sometimes play against each other in big matches, just like your favorite teams might play against each other. It's always exciting when different countries meet on the field!

What is a Visa? It's Like a Magic Pass!

Now, imagine you want to visit your friend's house. You knock on the door, and your friend lets you in, right? But if you want to visit a country far away, it's a bit different. You need a special permission. This special permission is called a "visa." A visa is like a special sticker or stamp in your passport, which is your travel book. It shows that another country says, "Yes, you can come visit us!" Did you know? Different countries have different rules for visas. Some countries let you visit easily, and for others, you need to ask for a visa first! It's like having a special ticket to enter a park.

Players Get Their Passes! Hooray!

So, the news starts with some good news! The football players from Iran wanted to go to the United States. Why? Maybe for a special practice, or a friendly game, or to get ready for another big competition. The important people in the United States looked at their requests and said, "Yes! The Iranian football players can come into our country." Hooray! That's good news for the players. It means they got their visas. They got their special passes! Everyone was happy for them. The players could pack their bags, grab their footballs, and get ready to travel. Did you know? Football players sometimes travel all over the world to play games! They fly in big airplanes from one country to another.

Who Are the "Technical Staff"?

Now, imagine a football team. You see the players, right? They run, they kick, they score goals! But do you know who helps them behind the scenes? It's not just the players on the field. There are many important helpers! These helpers are called "technical staff." Who are they? They are the coaches who teach the players new moves. They are the doctors who make sure players are healthy and help them if they get hurt. They are the people who look after the footballs and all the equipment. They are like the super helpers who make sure everything goes smoothly for the team. Without them, the players might not be able to play their best! Did you know? A football team can have many coaches! There's a head coach, but also coaches for fitness, for goalies, and for different parts of the game!

Oh No! Helpers Can't Go!

Here is where our story gets a little tricky. Just a few hours after the football players got their special passes to enter the United States, something else happened. The people from Iran said, "Oh no! Our technical staff, our super helpers, were told 'no'!". This means the coaches, the doctors, the equipment helpers – they did not get their visas. They were "denied" entry. It's like the players got their tickets to the party, but their best friends who help them get ready were told they couldn't come. This is a bit confusing, isn't it? First, the players can go. Then, the helpers cannot. It makes things very difficult for the team. How can the players play their best if their coaches and doctors are not with them?

Why Is This a Bit Sad?

This news makes some people a little sad and confused. Imagine your school team getting ready for a big match. Everyone is excited. But then, your coach or your team doctor can't come to the game! Would that be fair? Would it make it harder for your team to play well? Yes, it would! Football is all about teamwork and fair play. Every team needs all its members, not just the players, but the helpers too! When important helpers can't travel with the team, it can make it very hard for the team to do their best. It's like trying to build a big sandcastle without enough buckets and shovels. You need all your tools and all your friends to help! Did you know? Teamwork is one of the most important things in football! Everyone has to work together to win.

Fair Play for Everyone!

In sports, we always talk about "fair play." This means everyone should be treated fairly and have an equal chance. When some parts of a team can go, but other very important parts cannot, it doesn't feel like fair play for the whole team. We hope that all the people who make decisions for countries can talk and find a way so that everyone who is part of a football team can travel together. Because football brings people together, and it's always better when everyone can be part of the fun and the challenge!

What Happens Next?

So, what happens now? Important people called "officials" from Iran and the United States will talk about this. They will try to find a solution. We hope they can sort it out quickly so that the Iranian football team can have all their amazing helpers with them when they need to travel and play. Let's all cheer for fair play and for everyone to be able to follow their dreams, whether they are players or the fantastic helpers behind the scenes! Thank you for listening, my little champions! Keep kicking that ball and dreaming big! Did you know? There are many different sports in the world, not just football! Like basketball, running, swimming, and more! All of them teach us about teamwork and trying our best.
summary: Football players from Iran got special permission to visit the United States, but their coaches and doctors did not get permission, which makes things tricky for the team.
whyMatters: This is important because for a football team to play their best, they need all their helpers, like coaches and doctors, to be with them. It's about being fair to everyone on the team.

originalTitle: This was a training game - England & Tuchel now need to get serious
title: One Last Practice! England Gets Ready for the Big Football Party!
content:
Hello, Football Friends!

Welcome, welcome, everybody! It's me, your super-duper kid-friendly news reporter, bringing you exciting news all the way from our amazing continent of Africa! Get ready, because today we are talking about something super special: FOOTBALL! We all love football, don't we? It's the game where players run, kick, and score amazing goals!

What is the World Cup?

Imagine the biggest, most exciting football party in the whole wide world! That's what the World Cup is! It's a huge tournament where different countries send their best football teams to play against each other. They all want to win the shiny, golden trophy and be called the best team in the world! Did you know?

The World Cup happens only once every four years! So, when it comes around, it's a very big deal, and everyone gets super excited!

England's Big Football Dream

There's a team called England. They have many fantastic players who are very good at kicking the ball and scoring goals. Just like many teams around the world, England has a big dream: they want to win the World Cup!

To win, they need to play their very, very best. They need to practice a lot and work together like a super team.

Did you know?

England actually won the World Cup a long, long time ago, in 1966! They want to do it again for their country!

One More Practice Game!

Now, for the exciting news! The England team has only one more game to play before the real World Cup tournament starts. Think of it like a very important rehearsal for a big school play! This game is not for the World Cup trophy itself, but it's super important.

It's like a final test for the team to make sure everything is perfect before the big show begins. They need to use this game very, very smartly!

Why Practice Games Are Super Important

Why is this one last practice game so important? Well, imagine you have a big test at school. You wouldn't go without studying, would you? It's the same for football teams.

These practice games help the players get strong and fit. They run a lot, they kick the ball, and they learn how to play even better together. It's like going to the gym and doing your homework all at once!

Did you know?

Practice games are also called 'friendly matches' because even though they play to win, the main goal is to get ready and learn, not to win a big trophy just yet!

Learning and Growing Together

In this final practice game, the coaches watch everything very carefully. They see which players play best together. They try new ideas for how the team should attack and defend. Sometimes, they might try new players to see if they are ready for the big games.

If they make a small mistake in this practice game, it's okay! Because that's how they learn. They can fix it before the real World Cup games start. It's all about growing and getting better every single day.

Did you know?

Sometimes, a player who wasn't very famous before a practice game can suddenly show everyone their amazing skills and become a big star for the World Cup!

Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!

Football is not just about one player. It's about everyone working together like a giant puzzle. In this practice game, England's players will focus on teamwork. They will pass the ball, help each other, and cheer for their friends.

When a team works together, they are much stronger! They can score more goals and stop the other team from scoring. It's like when you and your friends work together on a school project, it's always better!

Did you know?

A football team has 11 players on the field at one time, and they all have special jobs to do to help the team win!

Getting Ready for the Big Stage

Playing in the World Cup is a very big deal. Many, many people around the world will be watching. So, players also need to be ready in their minds. They need to be brave, excited, and confident.

This last practice game helps them feel ready for the bright lights and the loud cheers of the crowd. It makes them feel strong inside and out.

Our African Football Stars!

And remember, here in Africa, we also have amazing football teams that work very hard to play in the World Cup! They also have practice games and train super hard. We are so proud of our African teams and their fantastic players! Did you know?

Many African countries have sent their teams to the World Cup, and they always show amazing talent and passion for the game!

Let's Cheer Them On!

So, England has one last chance to get everything perfect before their big football journey. Let's all wish them, and all the teams from Africa and around the world, good luck! We can't wait to watch the World Cup and see all the amazing football. Go, teams, go!
summary: England's football team has one final practice game to get super ready for the exciting World Cup tournament, and they need to use this chance wisely to play their best.
whyMatters: This is important because practice games help football teams get strong, learn to play together, and try new ideas so they can be the very best when the real big World Cup games begin!

originalTitle: Patient, precise, clinical - are Scotland ready to make World Cup mark?
title: Scotland's Big Football Adventure! Ready for World Cup Dreams!
content:
Hello, my amazing friends all over Africa! I'm your friendly news reporter, ready to tell you about some super exciting football news! We all love football, right? Kicking a ball with friends, cheering for our favourite teams – it's the best! Today, we're going to talk about a team called Scotland and their big football dreams.

What is Football?

Football, or soccer as some call it, is a game played with a round ball. Two teams try to score goals by kicking the ball into the other team's net. It's super fun to watch and play! Many, many people around the world love football, including here in Africa. It brings people together and makes us happy!

Scotland Plays a Big Game!

Imagine a country far, far away called Scotland. It's a place with green hills and old castles. They have a national football team, just like our countries in Africa have their own teams. Recently, Scotland played a football game against another country called Bolivia. And guess what? Scotland won! They won by a lot of goals. We say they 'thrashed' Bolivia, which means they played really, really well and scored many more goals than the other team. It was a fantastic win for them! This kind of big win makes everyone on the team feel strong and happy. It's like when you study hard for a test and get a very good mark – you feel ready for the next one, right?

Did You Know?

Did you know that football is the most popular sport in the whole world? Billions of people watch and play it! That's more than half the people on Earth!

Getting Ready for the World Cup!

This big win against Bolivia is very important because Scotland is getting ready for something even bigger. They are getting ready for the World Cup! Have you heard of the World Cup? It's like the biggest football party in the whole world! Teams from all over the planet come together to play against each other to see who is the very best football team. It happens only every four years, and everyone gets very excited. Our own African teams, like Senegal, Morocco, and Nigeria, also dream of playing and winning at the World Cup! It's a huge honour to represent your country on such a big stage.

What Does 'In Decent Fettle' Mean?

The news said that Scotland is 'in decent fettle.' This is a grown-up way of saying they are in very good shape! It means the players are fit and strong, they are playing well together as a team, and they are feeling confident. Imagine your favourite toy car. If it's 'in decent fettle,' it means it's working perfectly and ready to race! That's how the Scotland team feels right now – ready to race and play their very best. When a team wins a game like they did against Bolivia, it helps them feel even more ready. It's like a warm-up race before the big, important race. It helps them practice their skills and work together even better.

Did You Know?

Did you know the World Cup trophy is made of gold? It's called the FIFA World Cup Trophy, and it's a very famous prize that every football player dreams of lifting!

The Biggest Game of Their Lives

The news also said that Scotland is just one week away from 'the biggest game of their international lives.' Wow! That sounds super important, doesn't it? For a football player, playing in the World Cup is a huge dream. Every game there is like a final, especially the first ones, because they decide if you can stay in the competition or go home. So, this win against Bolivia was not just a fun game; it was a way to practice and get ready for these super big, super important World Cup matches. They want to show everyone how good they are and make their country proud!

Teamwork Makes the Dream Work

Football is all about teamwork. Each player has a special job, and they all need to work together like pieces of a puzzle to win the game. When a team is 'in decent fettle,' it means their teamwork is also very strong. They pass the ball well, help each other, and celebrate goals together. Just like in our schools or homes, when we work together, things become much easier and more fun. Scotland's big win shows they are working together like a fantastic team!

Looking Forward!

So, Scotland is feeling very happy and strong after beating Bolivia. They are pumped up and ready for their big World Cup challenge! It's going to be exciting to watch them play. Maybe one day, you too will be a famous football player representing your country at the World Cup! Keep practicing, keep dreaming, and always have fun! We will be cheering for all the teams, including our amazing African teams, as they chase their World Cup dreams!
summary: Scotland's football team won a big practice game against Bolivia, making them feel strong and ready for their super important World Cup matches!
whyMatters: This news is important because it shows how a football team gets ready for a huge event like the World Cup, which is a very exciting competition where countries from all over the world play to be the best!

originalTitle: Born in Leeds, crafted in Norway: How Haaland became nation's superstar
title: Erling Haaland: A Super Football Star from a Small Place!
content:
Jambo, my amazing friends! Welcome to our special news report! I'm so excited to tell you about a fantastic football player who is making big waves all around the world! His name is Erling Haaland! Can you say that with me? Er-ling Haa-land!

Imagine a hero who kicks a ball so well, he makes everyone cheer! That's Erling! He plays for his country, Norway, and he is super good at scoring goals. Let's find out more about this incredible young man and his big adventures!

Meet Our Football Hero!

Erling Haaland is a very special footballer. He is tall and super fast! When he runs with the ball, it's like watching a speedy gazelle on the field! He loves to score goals, and he is very, very good at it. When Erling plays, exciting things happen!

He makes football look like magic. Every time he touches the ball near the goal, people get ready to cheer! He is a champion for his country, Norway, and for his club teams too. He works hard and always gives his best on the field.

He scores so many goals that it's hard to count them all! He is like a goal-scoring machine, always finding the back of the net. This makes his fans super happy and proud!

Did you know? Erling Haaland is sometimes called 'The Terminator' or 'The Cyborg' because he scores so many goals! He seems unstoppable when he has the ball!

What is the World Cup?

Now, you might hear about something called the 'World Cup'. What is that? It's like the biggest, most exciting football party on Earth! It happens every four years, and it's a huge competition.

Teams from all over the world, like South Africa, Nigeria, Egypt, and many more, play against each other. They all want to win the big shiny trophy and be called the best team in the world. It's a huge honour to play in the World Cup!

Imagine all the best football players from every country coming together to play! It's super cool and full of amazing moments. For a country to play in the World Cup, they have to be one of the very best teams. It takes a lot of hard work and teamwork to get there.

Erling Haaland helped his country, Norway, get ready for this big competition. He played so well and scored so many important goals that Norway is going to the World Cup! This is a very big deal for them and makes everyone in Norway jump for joy.

Did you know? The very first World Cup was played way back in 1930! That's a super long time ago, even before your parents or grandparents were born! It's one of the oldest and most famous sports events in the world.

Norway: A Small Home, a Big Star!

Erling comes from a country called Norway. It's in a faraway place called Europe. Norway is a beautiful country, but it's not very big. It has about 5.5 million people living there.

Now, 5.5 million people might sound like a lot, but for a whole country, it's actually quite small! Some big cities in Africa have more people than the whole country of Norway! Imagine that! It's like a small town with a big heart.

So, for a small country like Norway to have a football superstar like Erling Haaland, it's a super special thing. It's like a small garden growing the biggest, brightest sunflower for everyone to see!

Erling makes everyone in Norway feel super proud. He shows that even if you come from a small place, you can still do amazing, big things in the world. He puts Norway on the map for football lovers everywhere.

Did you know? Norway is famous for its amazing mountains and deep, blue fjords. Fjords are like very long, narrow parts of the sea that go deep into the land, with tall cliffs on either side! They are super beautiful!

Famous All Over the World!

What does it mean to be a 'global name'? It means Erling Haaland is famous all over the world! People in Africa, Asia, America, and everywhere else know his name and watch him play on TV or online.

He is not just famous in Norway; he is famous everywhere! When he plays, millions of people tune in to watch him score his amazing goals. He makes people smile and jump with joy when he scores.

Imagine if everyone in your school, then everyone in your town, then everyone in your country, and then everyone in many, many countries knew your name because you were so good at something! That's how famous Erling is!

It's a big responsibility to be so famous, but Erling handles it well. He keeps working hard and loves to play football with passion. He is a great example for all of us to follow our dreams.

Did you know? Erling Haaland loves to eat his mother's lasagna! Maybe that's his secret power food that gives him all the energy to score those incredible goals! Yummy!

How Erling Became a Star!

No one becomes a superstar overnight. Erling Haaland started playing football when he was a very small boy, just like some of you might be playing in your backyards or with your friends!

He practiced, and practiced, and practiced. He kicked the ball in his garden, with his friends, and with his team. He worked hard every single day to get better and better, even when it was raining or cold.

He listened to his coaches and learned new tricks. He never gave up, even when things were tough or he made a mistake. That's why he is so good today! His dedication is amazing.

This shows us that if you love something, and you work very hard, you can achieve your dreams. Just like Erling with his football! He put in the hours and it paid off.

He has big dreams for Norway and for himself. He wants to help his country do well in the World Cup, and make his fans happy with his awesome play. He plays with all his heart and a big smile.

Did you know? Erling Haaland's dad, Alfie Haaland, was also a famous football player! He played for Norway too! It seems like scoring goals and playing great football runs in the family!

You Can Be a Star Too!

So, what can we learn from Erling Haaland, our superstar from Norway? We learn that hard work pays off, and dreaming big is important!

We learn that it doesn't matter if you come from a big city or a small village, you can still shine brightly. Just like Norway, a small country, has a big star making them proud!

Always try your best, play fair, and never stop dreaming. Maybe one day, you will be a superstar in whatever you love to do, just like Erling Haaland is a superstar in football!

Keep practicing, keep smiling, and keep believing in yourselves, my little champions! We are so proud of Erling, and we are proud of all of you too! He is a true inspiration and a wonderful example.
summary: Erling Haaland is a tall, fast football superstar from Norway who is famous all over the world for scoring many goals and helping his small country qualify for the big World Cup for the first time in a long time.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows that even if you come from a small country or a small place, you can work very hard and become a super big star in the world, making everyone proud and inspiring others to follow their dreams!
